title: Update podman-generate-systemd man page
body:
Update links and content and, Add more examples to show how to run
the generated .service files as root and non-root.  Fix for #5497

Signed-off-by: Sujil02 <sushah@redhat.com>

comments.body:
> @sujil02 Can you finish this please.

I have completed the use cases for --new flag and installation of units. whats stuck is "need to enable lingering so that the services continue running even after user logout". I will get it done today.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan*, *sujil02* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
